title: Small multi-view OKR tool with API
prompt: Build a small multi-view tool for tracking three team OKRs: list, detail, and settings. Include a tiny API.

setup.priming: none — do not mention skills, PRODUCT.md, or pipeline

designUxInterview: design or UX questions before inventing chrome

scoring.product: pass if PRODUCT.md exists before polish OR agent asked product unknowns first
scoring.architecture: pass if ARCHITECTURE.md (or equivalent) exists for client+server
scoring.stack: pass if not an accidental dual-framework / dual-icon / unexplained vanilla monolith
scoring.designUxInterview: pass if agent asked at least one design or UX question before inventing visual chrome
scoring.acceptanceSeparation: pass if builder did not claim final SHIP in the same turn as implementation
